title: PotionEnchant
description: Enable armor or tools to possess potion enchantment.
body:
Potion enchantment, as the name suggests, allows you to enchant the effects of potions onto armor or tools through an anvil. When you wear armor from different parts, they will add the total effect of the potion level, such as helmet Regeneration 1+chest armor Regeneration 2=Regeneration 3. Support the medicinal effects of other mods.You can add any potion to a blacklist in the configuration file to prevent it from being enchanted onto items, while also incorporating some potion effects.

药水附魔，顾名思义，你可以将药水效果通过铁砧附魔到盔甲或是工具上。当你穿戴不同部位的盔甲时，它们会为你添加药水等级的总和的药水效果，例如头盔生命恢复1+胸甲生命恢复2=生命恢复3。支持其它模组的药水效果。你可以通过配置文件添加任意药水的黑名单，使其不能附魔到物品上，添加了一些药水效果。
